Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: fireplace accessories [300425514], fire-making and controlling equipment [300024642], temperature control equipment [300434522], cooling, heating and humidifying equipment [300163291], equipment by process [300024659], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: supporting equipment [300024831], equipment by process [300024659], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Devices, usually metal, comprising vertical elements and often a horizontal bar, supported by legs, and used to support logs in a fireplace. May be used with a "fireplace grate."

Source.Source_ID: 2000106168/Parks Canada Descriptive Dictionary of Objects / Dictionnaire descriptif d’objets (c 1996)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Toestellen met een horizontale balk op een verticale staaf, op korte poten, die worden gebruikt om grote houtblokken te dragen in een open haard.
用於擺放在垂直物體上的裝置，具有橫桿，以短小支架支撐，用於支撐火爐內的大型木材。
Vorrichtung mit einer horizontalen Stange über einem vertikalen Stab, die auf kurzen Beinen steht und dazu genutzt wird, große Holzscheite in einer Feuerstelle zu tragen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000011151/Fleming and Honour, Penguin Dictionary of the Decorative Arts (1989)
